scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run build:browser-runtime-layer && sst deploy --stage develop --config infra/sst.config.ts
scripts.deploy:local: npm run build && npm run build:browser-runtime-layer && sst deploy --stage local --config infra/sst.config.ts
scripts.discord:sync: npm run build && sst shell --config infra/sst.config.ts -- npm run discord:sync:run
scripts.discord:sync:dry: npm run build && sst shell --config infra/sst.config.ts -- npm run discord:sync:run -- --dry-run
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run build:browser-runtime-layer && sst dev --config infra/sst.config.ts
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
